name: Ricochet
description: Rifle Post shots bounce to the nearest enemy within 64px after hitting their target.

name: Double Tap
description: Rifle Posts fire a second shot at a random enemy in range 0.1s after each primary shot.
flavor_text: The first shot wakes them. The second puts them down.

name: Chain Suppress
description: Suppress effect spreads to all enemies within 80px of the hit target.

name: One Shot
description: Sniper Nests have a 25% chance to instantly kill any Shambler.
flavor_text: Most of them never see it coming.

name: Napalm
description: Burning ground from Firebomb stacks — enemies that re-enter burning tiles take double fire damage. Requires Firebomb (rare).
flavor_text: Walk back into the fire. See what happens.

name: Shockwave
description: Molotov knockback becomes a stun — enemies are frozen for 0.5s on knockback. Requires Concussive (rare).
flavor_text: The blast doesn't just push. It stops.

name: Plague Pulse
description: Barbed Wire periodically emits a wide-range slow pulse affecting all enemies in a large radius every 3 seconds.
flavor_text: You feel it in your legs first.

name: Tangle Field+
description: Barbed Wire aura now fully stops enemies for 0.3s when they first enter range. Requires Tangle Field (rare).
flavor_text: The wire doesn't just slow. It holds.

name: The Killbox
description: Enemies within a Splash explosion radius take 60% bonus damage from Sniper Nests for 3 seconds after the explosion. Requires both tower types placed at high specialisation.
flavor_text: Every inch of that clearing is a death sentence.
